forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: ec80
+project: skills-guide-review
+title: Add `metadata` block to `thoughtful` and `really-done` skills
+---
+## What
+
+Every other builtin skill has a consistent metadata block:
+
+```yaml
+metadata:
+  author: swissarmyhammer
+  version: "{{version}}"
+```
+
+Two skills are missing it:
+
+- `builtin/skills/thoughtful/SKILL.md`
+- `builtin/skills/really-done/SKILL.md`
+
+The Anthropic guide (Reference B, "All optional fields") lists `metadata` with `author`, `version` as suggested. Consistency matters for distribution and discovery.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] Both skills have the standard metadata block with `author: swissarmyhammer` and `version: "{{version}}"`.
+
+## Tests
+
+- [ ] Grep `builtin/skills/*/SKILL.md` for `metadata:` and confirm all 21 skills have it.
+
+## Reference
+
+Anthropic guide, Reference B — "All optional fields", metadata entries.
\ No newline at end of file

changes.value:
## What

Every other builtin skill has a consistent metadata block:

```yaml
metadata:
  author: swissarmyhammer
  version: "{{version}}"
```

Two skills are missing it:

- `builtin/skills/thoughtful/SKILL.md`
- `builtin/skills/really-done/SKILL.md`

The Anthropic guide (Reference B, "All optional fields") lists `metadata` with `author`, `version` as suggested. Consistency matters for distribution and discovery.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Both skills have the standard metadata block with `author: swissarmyhammer` and `version: "{{version}}"`.

## Tests

- [ ] Grep `builtin/skills/*/SKILL.md` for `metadata:` and confirm all 21 skills have it.

## Reference

Anthropic guide, Reference B — "All optional fields", metadata entries.
